name: Mecum Auctions
overview: The Mecum Auction crew works like an orchestra with the auctioneer calling bids, the ring men working the crowd for bids, and a ring man working the sellers trying to get them to accept the bids.

trailers.title: Only 1 of 20! STUNNING 1972 Chevrolet Corvette ZR1 | Mecum Auctions Harrisburg | MotorTrend
